problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region may resolve Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
